# Android Emulator Internal Testing

Public site:
https://renawells.github.io/adwaita-android-emulator/

This is a GTK/libadwaita Android Emulator manager for Linux.
It supports native glibc systems and Alpine/musl through an Arch chroot runtime.

About:
Android Emulator is a Linux-first control surface for Android SDK setup,
optimized AVD creation, QEMU-backed Android PC ISO profiles, controller checks,
launch logs, and AppImage distribution. It is currently in internal testing.

Key features:
- Android SDK detection
- Setup wizard for SDK, Arch chroot, and gaming AVD setup
- Gaming profile for Gaming_API_30
- Immutable host setup for SteamOS, Bazzite, Bluefin, and ostree systems
- Custom LineageOS x86_64 gaming AVD import and PC ISO QEMU profile
- MIUI Android-x86 community ISO QEMU/KVM profile
- Controller detection
- AppImage packaging
- GitHub Pages website

Recommended AVD:
Gaming_API_30

Recent changelog:
- 2026-07-05: Added immutable distro detection, default host package skip, and portable Java 17 setup for SteamOS, Bazzite, Bluefin, and ostree-style systems.
- 2026-07-05: Added Gaming_MIUI_x86_PC_ISO for the MIUI-12-X86-PORTABLE-ANDROID-V1-PUCKROM2020.iso community image.
- 2026-07-05: Added LineageOS x86_64 custom image import and LineageOS PC ISO QEMU/KVM support.
- 2026-07-04: Added AppImage packaging, controller support, website dark mode, real screenshot, HTTPS hosting, and third-party notices.
- 2026-07-03: Stabilized Alpine/musl runtime through an Arch chroot after gcompat crashes with the Google emulator binary.

AppImage download:
https://renawells.github.io/adwaita-android-emulator/downloads/Android_Emulator-x86_64.AppImage

Third-party notices:
https://renawells.github.io/adwaita-android-emulator/third-party-notices.html
